message.content:
(1) There are 4 candidate rows visible in the table (Kadiatou Konaté, Ibrahim Touré, Rokia Diallo, and Seydou Bagayoko).  
(2) Yes, there is a pagination bar at the bottom of the table. The pagination bar includes "Affichage" text (indicating display settings) and page navigation buttons (e.g., "Précédent" and "Suivant" or numbered pages), confirming its presence.
